parameters.query: =SELECT r.id, r.route_number, r.zip_code, r.homes_covered FROM routes r JOIN cities c ON r.city_id = c.id WHERE c.name = '{{ $json.city }}' AND c.state_code = '{{ $json.state }}' ORDER BY r.priority DESC

meta.description: Scrapes all routes for a city in one batch. Fetches all routes from Supabase, then scrapes each route's zip code for local businesses.
meta.usage: POST to webhook with body: { city: 'Fayetteville', state: 'NC', categories: 'tattoo shop,barbershop,gym,restaurant' }
requirements: Google Maps API key (set as env var GOOGLE_MAPS_API_KEY in n8n)
City and routes must exist in database
